name: Casa Maja
description:
Welcome to Casa Maja, a beautifully finished 2-bedroom penthouse perched in the heart of Estepona’s rising coastal scene. This brand-new home is the epitome of modern Mediterranean living, with clean architectural lines, a soft neutral palette, and abundant natural light streaming through expansive windows. The open-plan living and dining area flows seamlessly onto a private terrace, blending indoor comfort with outdoor lifestyle. The kitchen is fully equipped with high-spec appliances, sleek cabinetry, and plenty of prep space—perfect for everything from morning coffees to dinner with friends.

Both bedrooms are generously sized and styled with contemporary furnishings and built-in storage with the Master bedroom enjoying a King size bed and the second bedroom with 2 single bed's, ideal for guests or family. High-quality finishes and modern fixtures run throughout the property, including within the stylish bathroom and guest toilet.

The showpiece of Casa Maja is its rooftop solarium, where panoramic views stretch over the Mediterranean Sea, surrounding hills, and distant mountains. This expansive rooftop space has been thoughtfully designed with a lounge zone, sunbeds, and alfresco dining area—making it an unforgettable spot to soak up the sun by day or entertain under the stars. From here, the tranquility of the sea and the elegance of the coast create a truly elevated living experience.

Set within a secure and well-maintained development, the residence offers access to first-class communal facilities, including a sea-facing pool surrounded by tropical gardens and a gym. Located just a 20 minute walk from Estepona’s charming old town, vibrant marina and sandy beaches as well as a short drive from its award-winning golf courses, Marbella and Puerto Banus. Casa Maja combines peaceful living with easy access to everything the Costa del Sol has to offer. Whether as a holiday retreat or stylish base for year-round living, this penthouse is a true standout.

Please note that we welcome families and couples only, no groups under 30, and no hen or stag parties. Should you fall outside of this category but wish to book nonetheless, please send us an enquiry detailing a bit more about yourself and the group that you will be travelling with so we can request this for you.
rules: No groups under 30 years of age
map_query: Casa Maja, Estepona, Costa del Sol, Spain
